name: First Cash Pawn
description_short: Louisville's First Cash Pawn on Taylorsville Rd offers quick pawn loans and buying services.
description_long:
First Cash Pawn's Taylorsville Road location in Louisville, KY operates as a standalone pawn shop ready to serve the local community. Located at 9808 Taylorsville Rd, this Louisville store is open Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 7 PM, and Saturday from 10 AM to 5:30 PM, with Sunday closures. The convenient hours make it accessible for weekday and weekend shopping.

At this Louisville First Cash Pawn location, you can get quick pawn loans, sell items for cash, and buy pre-owned merchandise including jewelry, electronics, and collectibles. Call 502-261-0088 to ask about current inventory, pawn terms, or to discuss what items you're looking to sell or pawn. The staff can provide instant quotes over the phone.

Whether you need fast cash, want to sell items you no longer need, or are hunting for deals on quality used goods, this Taylorsville Rd pawn shop serves Louisville residents and visitors. Bring a valid government ID and the items you want to pawn or sell. First Cash Pawn specializes in turning your possessions into immediate cash when you need it most.
pros: 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, UK, and Latin America provide exceptional convenience and accessibility
No credit check required for pawn loans—serves cash and credit-constrained consumers effectively
Non-recourse loans mean borrowers have no personal liability beyond the pledged collateral
Fast cash on-the-spot for gold, jewelry, and merchandise sales
Layaway service available with affordable 10% down payment option
Wide variety of merchandise purchased (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, musical instruments, sporting goods)
Publicly-traded company (S&P MidCap 400, Russell 2000) indicates financial stability and regulatory oversight
cons: Forfeiture of pledged items if pawn loans aren't repaid—loss of personal property with sentimental or functional value
Pawn loans don't build credit history, offering no credit-building benefit for consumers
Interest rates and loan terms vary significantly by location and state regulations, creating unpredictable costs
Limited to consumers with valuable personal property to pledge; not accessible to those without collateral
Pawn transactions are short-term cash solutions, not suitable for consumers needing sustained financial assistance
best_for: Consumers with valuable personal property (jewelry, electronics, instruments) who need immediate cash and can afford to reclaim items
Credit-constrained individuals who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans but need quick access to funds
People seeking to sell gold, jewelry, or other merchandise for immediate cash without negotiating with private buyers
Shoppers looking for bargain merchandise on FirstCash's shelves or seeking layaway purchase options
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for consumers with valuable personal property who need immediate cash and can afford redemption, or those seeking to sell merchandise for fast payment. The critical caveat is that pawn loans result in permanent loss of items if not repaid—they are short-term collateral-based transactions, not credit products, and offer no credit-building benefit.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property with non-recourse structure
Gold and precious metal buying with on-the-spot cash payment
Retail sales of merchandise (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments)
Layaway service with 10% down payment option
Store locator and inventory browsing online
Lease-to-own and retail finance solutions through AFF subsidiary (15,000+ merchant partners)
meta_description: First Cash Pawn at 9808 Taylorsville Rd, Louisville, KY. Quick pawn loans, buying, and selling.
